tab1.title: Biography
tab1.content: Adel Imam is one of the most influential actors in the Arab world, known for blending comedy with political and social commentary. His long career made him a cultural icon.

tab2.title: Notable Works

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He is widely known as the king of Arabic comedy.
